Reporting.title: Report Building Issue
Reporting.description: Snap a photo of the issue and we'll handle the rest.
Reporting.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Reporting.invalid_issue: No maintenance issue detected. Please try snapping a clearer photo.
Reporting.validation_tooltip: Please select Floor and Resource first
Reporting.snap_trigger_subtext: Take a photo and AI will do the rest!
Reporting.separator_text: We're here to solve any building issue!
Reporting.hero_headline: Issue? Hazard? Fix it in a snap.
Reporting.rate_limit_error: Too many reports sent in the last minute. Please wait a moment and try again.
Reporting.phone_error: Valid number starts with 0 and contains 9-10 digits
Reporting.landing_hero_headline: Issue? Hazard? TikTak and it's fixed.
Reporting.landing_hero_subheadline: No apps. No calls. No headache. Automated issue tracking & reporting directly from WhatsApp.
Reporting.landing_hero_audience: For committee managers, local councils, and management companies – all reports in one place, sorted and prioritized.
Reporting.landing_flow_headline: 15 Seconds on Average. No Apps, No Passwords.
Reporting.landing_flow_step1_desc: Open the link, snap the issue or hazard on site.
Reporting.landing_flow_step2_desc: AI engine automatically detects and classifies the issue, just confirm details are correct and tap 'Send' to WhatsApp.
Reporting.landing_flow_step3_desc: The report is instantly logged in the system.
Reporting.landing_mgr_headline: From Chaotic WhatsApp to Organized Dashboard
Reporting.landing_mgr_bullet1: All reports consolidated in one place in real time
Reporting.landing_mgr_bullet2: Smart automated prioritization by urgency and categories
Reporting.landing_mgr_bullet3: Direct communication channel and automated status updates to reporter
Reporting.landing_feature_quicktap_desc: One-click reporting. Pre-configured templates for recurring issues. Two taps and it's sent.
Reporting.landing_feature_sla_desc: No report gets lost. Automated alerts for committee and residents. Custom dashboard color states.
Reporting.landing_feature_ai_desc: Smart auto-recognition. Take a photo and the system automatically identifies the issue type.
Reporting.landing_about_desc: We built TikTak out of deep frustration with chaotic community WhatsApp groups where issues and requests simply got lost. Our goal is to provide a fully automated tracking layer that handles the bureaucracy in the background, keeps public spaces functioning, and enables rapid treatment – without forcing any resident to download another useless app.
Reporting.landing_pricing_pilot_details: 1 active WhatsApp line, basic AI categorization, up to 50 active reports per month.
Reporting.landing_pricing_enterprise_details: Simultaneous integration with multiple WhatsApp lines, custom SLA alerts, multi-user management, advanced data export.
Reporting.landing_modal_success: Registration received successfully! A representative will contact you shortly to start the pilot.
Reporting.view_previous_reports: View previous reports in your building
Reporting.phone_not_registered_notice: Your phone number is not recognized in the system yet
Reporting.enter_phone_label: Please enter your phone number to view your reports:
